blocks.text: Wednesday is unmissable: Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP in the biggest club match ever played on Norwegian soil — and Real Madrid meet Manchester City the same night. European football doesn't get weightier than this.
⚽ Wed 21:00 — 🇳🇴 Bodø/Glimt vs Sporting CP, Champions League history at Aspmyra

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — Wednesday
items: Bayer Leverkusen vs Arsenal — 18:45 (Arsenal lead PL by 7pts)

blocks.text: 🚴 Mon 12:40 — Tirreno-Adriatico opens, Leknessund & Wærenskjold carry Norwegian colours
